// <auto-generated />
using SourceGen.Ioc;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
[assembly: IocRegisterDefaults(typeof(ICommandHandler), ServiceLifetime.Transient, ImplementationTypes = [typeof(MyApp.Handlers.CreateCommandHandler), typeof(MyApp.Handlers.UpdateCommandHandler)])]
[assembly: IocRegisterDefaults(typeof(IQueryHandler), ServiceLifetime.Transient, ImplementationTypes = [typeof(MyApp.Handlers.GetQueryHandler), typeof(MyApp.Handlers.ListQueryHandler)])]
